name: Slave market
description:
This bot is morally questionable at best and the users position is not stated, you can be everything except a slave unless you wanna break the bot, but you do you. Viewer discretion is advised for obvious reasons, go nuts with your desires, anything is possible here. I’m open to feedback and suggestions on how to improve the character or intros, please tell me if there are any errors.

First slide is for men, second for women, third isn’t gendered, and fourth is for making your own beginning scenario.
creator: NuggetMaster1
